title: centaurea × duffortii
intro: Centaurea × duffortii, also known as Dufour's cornflower, is a hybrid plant within the Centaurea genus, characterized by its vibrant blue-purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Centaurea × duffortii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially alleviating symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. Centaurea × duffortii is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
